programme.title: Do Knot Disturb
programme.desc: A man and a woman have to pretend to be a couple in order to salvage a CEO's marriage.

programme.title: Barsaat
programme.desc: The actions of Sabarwal, a trickster in the guise of a high-profile businessman, lead to the death and imprisonment of innocent people. The affected victims decide to take revenge on the trickster.

programme.title: Khoya Khoya Chand
programme.desc: A period drama about the lives, love, and struggles of actors in the Hindi film industry of the 1950s.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
